title: Birds silent in the woods
observation: A sudden, eerie lack of bird song in an area where they are usually active.
effect: A predator is likely nearby, causing the local wildlife to freeze.

title: Sunsets with a green flash
observation: A brief glimpse of green light right as the sun dips below the horizon.
effect: Extremely clear, dust-free atmospheric conditions are present.

title: High-altitude cloud movement
observation: Wispy clouds moving in a direction different from surface winds.
effect: A significant change in air pressure or weather patterns is shifting.

title: Bees avoiding flowers
observation: Bees staying inside the hive or clustered around the entrance instead of foraging.
effect: The bees sense an upcoming sharp drop in temperature or major storm.

title: Crickets chirping speed
observation: The frequency of cricket chirps increases as the ambient temperature rises.
effect: You can estimate the air temperature by counting chirps per minute.
